response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with 15+ years of experience, but their background is predominantly web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), while this role demands deep, current C++ expertise for industrial automation. Their C++ exposure is limited to a 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis project, and C++ is notably absent from their skills list. There is no evidence of IEC 62443/SDL security practice, MQTT, message brokers at industrial scale, or automation-domain protocols, which are core to this position.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) exceeding the 8-12 year requirement
Systems-level performance work at Sociomantic: low-latency services, async I/O, fibers, high-throughput data handling
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, mentoring and workshop delivery
concerns: Minimal and dated hands-on C++ experience; C++ not listed among current skills
No industrial cybersecurity, SDL, or IEC 62443 exposure evident
No demonstrated MQTT, industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA), or automation-machinery domain background

key_factors.factor: Strong general seniority and performance-systems experience
